title: Lucid (LCID) Stock Q1 2026 Earnings Preview: What Analysts Are Watching Today
text: Lucid Q1 2026 Earnings Preview: What Analysts Are Watching. Revenue Expectations. Analysts expected approximately $370 million in Q1 2026 revenue, representing 57% year-over-year growth from Q1 2025. This projection implied continued ramp in production and deliveries as the company brought the Gravity SUV to scale. Delivery Forecasts. Market participants anticipated delivery of approximately 5,000 vehicles in Q1 2026 based on production guidance and pre-order demand. This expectation reflected belief in the company's ability to execute on stated guidance. Loss Projections. Analysts projected continued net losses for Q1 2026, with consensus EPS of approximately -$2.35 per share. This loss level was expected as the company continued to scale production while managing significant capital expenditures. Gravity Performance. Key focus areas for analysts included Gravity SUV deliveries and production ramp, as well as the status of any supply chain or quality issues affecting the crucial new model. Robotaxi Strategy. Analysts were monitoring progress on the robotaxi partnership with Uber and any updates to production or deployment timelines.
